metadata.description: Microsoft GBB skills catalog for the GitHub Copilot CLI ecosystem (Copilot CLI GA, Copilot Desktop App, VS Code agent mode, Claude Code). One plugin installs all 38 skills.

plugins.name: awesome-gbb
plugins.description: 38 reusable GBB skills: seller enablement, Azure infra (azd, Bicep, ACA), Foundry agents (hosted agents, RAG, MCP, evals, observability), governance (Citadel, AGT), Threadlight pipeline, digital-clone orchestration, cost analysis, tenant isolation, and enterprise automation.
